items.content_html: Gittory is a NeoVim plugin written in Lua that changes your working directory to the root of your project if you use Git. It is useful to use with Telescope and Harpoon, depending on your needs and workflow.
items.title: IsWladi/Gittory: Gittory is a NeoVim plugin written in Lua that changes your working directory to the root of your project if you use Git. It is useful to use with Telescope and Harpoon, depending on your needs and workflow.
